items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of the Learning Continuity and Attendance Plan for 2020-21
Approval of 2019-20 Unaudited Actuals Financial Statement
Adoption of Resolution 10, Resolution to Adopt the Gann Limit
San Mateo County Office of Education Review and Approval of RCSD Adopted Budget for Fiscal Year 2020-21 and the COVID-19 Operations Written Report

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced at beginning of meeting. Roll call vote taken to approve agenda as posted.
